raw_text: Your delivery is very fast. When I buy product from you it is not defective when. I see things on blink it everything is mainly in the stock. I like your service.

I am writing this review because i had a verg bad experience from blinkit. I ordered an Antson body massager from Blinkit. The product that came had no brand name on the massager or the box. It was just a plain unbranded piece with no proper label. Also, Blinkit has removed the return option from the app. so i connected with customer support after a long argument they had initiated a return when i told them return is my ri8 because u delivered unbranded things .

Excellent app for quick grocery delivery! The interface is simple and easy to use, delivery is usually very fast, and the products are fresh and well-packed. It has made daily shopping much more convenient and time-saving. The discounts and offers are also helpful. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a reliable grocery delivery service.

I've been trying to complain about a product I received but your chat section doesn't allow me to reselect the order to make the complaint (there were 2 orders). Damn frustrating which I guess is what this app aims at; for the customer to just give up

Hi everyone, I have noticed there careless behavior about delivering frozen items or anything. I am unable to understand that why are they charging us handling and delivery fees. I request the team to keep a check on this issue. and improve it.

Poor app and poor experience, whenever you look the price of everything is high, even after applying coupon it remains high, delivery charge 30 handling charge 5 small card fee ₹20 why are you charging all this Any item worth ₹10, you take handling charge, platform fee, delivery charge, small card charge and make it worth ₹200-300 and the coupon are also useless, why do you charge so much, useless cheap app.I approach the consumer forum court that all this is not being removed after court order.

they charge delivery and handling charges for big orders as well. the handling is still poor and they sent expired items which are listed on offer. they also describe one item and send a different one.

Worst app ,doesn't have replacement policy,Very bad after sales support,If you buy any product from then you can't have any option to replace or return it.They only give wrong 7 days replacement policy.They wouldn't properly solve your problem.

Great app for convenience, but worst support and business ethics. No accountability for missing items, all blame and responsibility on customer. Any query is answered with the standard response-We are currently handling a large number of queries and are unable to assign someone immediately to assist you. Please reach out to us after sometime. We regret the inconvenience caused. Just wow.

Blinkit is really fast, and most of their items are cheaper. When I used it for the first time, I paid the delivery guy more than what I was supposed to pay. To my surprise, he came after me to give me back the extra money I paid. You don't see such things often.

What is the point of buying anything online if it can't be delivered at the doorstep and I have to go down 10 floors to get the stuff every time ? Earlier the delivery drivers used to deliver at the doorstep. Now, they just call on your phone and tell you to come down and get the order yourself. Brother, if I wanted to do that, i wouldn't have used Blinkit in the first place 🤦

Best service in here. U can anytime seek for customer support. Quality is extremely well maintain. There is no ads in the app. The phone does not gets warmer. The support by the blinkit for any return delivery is also the best ever seen. Over all I'm happy using this app.

Dear Blanket Team, I am extremely disappointed with the condition in which my order was delivered. As shown in the attached photo, the package was completely open. This is unacceptable, especially for a hygiene-related product. Customers expect such products to be delivered in a properly sealed, secure, and tamper-proof package. This kind of careless packaging raises serious concerns about the product's safety, cleanliness, and quality.

worst ever, they only provide chat support, but when cs want to cancel the item because of the delay, they will always call you if the item is damaged or something like that which you want to inform them they will always can not get your concern such a stupid customer support name diya did not provided any resolution if a cs us hungry that is y we are using this app so that we can get something to eat faster but they are idiots..

Well, the app is really convenient, but eventually I've been noticing that alot product (especially regarding cosmetics) I received are not seal packed, which takes away my trust. please do make sure all the products are sealed packed.

My order was split into two shipments, and a complimentary item — which was added to my cart because my order total exceeded the qualifying threshold — was not included in either delivery. Why offer such incentives if you have no intention of honoring them?

poor software interface, apps and websites aren't synchronous at all, from mobile it is detecting location properly but from Desktop or laptop it is detecting ISP and sending products to the wrong delivery location. for cancellation Blinkit deducted money from the buyers.

Blinkit is one of the best service provider. I have a great experience from there service because it's just a one click away for everything emergency needs within no time. Best Regards keep it up. ☆☆☆☆☆

This is truly an amazing app! When it comes to lightning-fast delivery, it has no match. While it's a bit on the costly side, it's completely worth it for the convenience and ease of use it offers. Plus, the app runs incredibly smoothly without any lag but don't expect your refund in any case

worst app whenever we order the items delivery time shows 10 to 17 mins but we always got the orders after 45mins and some times above and now a days they are sending the package boxes like oil boxes rice packages used ones are not at all from blinkit one's like regular still they are charging for the package.. customer care not responding and the help option not at all working..worst experience
